title: HM Courts and Tribunals Service Board meeting 12 December 2024
body: "The meeting discussed items including:   Audit & Risk Assurance Committee Update Change Portfolio Update Implications of the Spending Review & 2025-26 Budget Allocation CEO Report Performance & Finance Updates Decommissioning Legacy & Risk Management Programme Business Case v3 Risk Appetite and Overall Risk Exposure Complaints and Dissatisfaction Deep Dive Workforce Modelling Setting priorities for the 2025/26 Business Planning cycle  "
